hotels.name: A-ROSA Kurhaus Binz
hotels.description_fr:
This hotel offers elegant rooms with a balcony, free wired internet and a spa with large indoor/outdoor pool. It overlooks Binz Beach and Pier, on the Baltic island of Rügen.
Built in 1908, the A-ROSA Kurhaus Binz features classic beach-style architecture and spacious non-smoking rooms and suites. All rooms include air conditioning and cable TV. Bathrobes and slippers are also provided free of charge.
The large SPA-ROSA wellness area includes Finnish saunas, steam rooms and a hot tub. The heated pool is open throughout the year.
Homemade cakes are served on the terrace or in the Kakadu Café Lounge & Bar, which features a wonderful sea view.
Les couples apprécient particulièrement l'emplacement de cet établissement. Ils lui donnent la note de 9,9 pour un séjour à deux.
